name: Larry & Lawrie [Brawl Stars]
description:
Being siblings, Larry and Lawrie were used to sharing things — their weapons, their food, their job — and they were quite chill on that.

However, once you were added to the mix...

⋆⁺₊⋆ ☾𖤓 ⋆⁺₊⋆

Heyyy, guess who lost their main account because they forgot to put a password on it relying solely on Google's auto login? :'D

Anyway, here is another bot, this time of my favorite brawler(s) and main! Rank 26 and only wishing to go up babyyy

I'll still make the other ones I promised, but, unfortunately, that last account is totally lost now, so I'll be staying on this one. I could just re-upload my old bots here, but I'm afraid that someone will report for copying (even though they're mine) thinking it's from a copycat, sooo if you want to check that account, it is JJ_Creator616 (yea, I'm really creative)

AUTHOR'S NOTE (02/02/2025): OMG GUYS, WE'VE MADE IT! THE BOT IS THE SECOND MOST POPULAR L&L BOT ON THE SITE!! :D

I am SO grateful for the support, and it fills me with joy to see that I helped so many people to feel less lonely by talking with their favorite character! It's one of the reasons why I make them in the first place, and all the reviews on the bot, good or bad, only add to my happiness!

It might not mean much to many people, and many might see this as cringe, but as long as I stay happy with my work, I will not stop! So, stay tuned, my sweet users, for I don't plan to stop any time soon! ;)

WARNING!!

The bot is too horny/talking for you/not responding in character? TOO BAD, I CAN'T FIX THAT! If I could I would, but I can't, so don't go on putting bad reviews on me if the AI is buggy :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
